title: lithospermum frutescens
intro: Lithospermum frutescens, also known as glandular hairy-lithospermum, is a perennial herbaceous plant native to Europe and Asia, characterized by its blue or purple flowers and hairy leaves. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic effects, derived from its constituents such as lithospermic acid and caffeic acid. The health benefits of Lithospermum frutescens include its potential to reduce inflammation, alleviate symptoms of menopausal hot flashes, and support immune system function. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and its extracts are also used in the production of topical creams and ointments for wound care and skin conditions.
